hero.subtitle: Nespresso's AAA™ Sustainable Quality Program
hero.description: Through the implementation of Nespresso's AAA Program, the strategic pillars of Inclusiveness, Regenerative Agriculture and Quality are developed with 421 producers from the departments of Copán and Ocotepeque.

diversificacion.title: Income Diversification
diversificacion.detail: 32 AAA female producers served in 2025, expanding to 45 more by 2026 in Copán and Ocotepeque.

diligencia.title: Human Rights Due Diligence
diligencia.detail: Review and adaptation of policies throughout the COHONDUCAFÉ Cluster's supply chain.

cosechaFeliz.title: Happy Harvest Project
cosechaFeliz.detail: Child labor prevention through safe spaces since 2023. 47 children served during the 25–26 harvest.

agua.title: Access to Drinking Water
agua.detail: Delivery of 265 water filters to coffee growers and their workers.

seguro.title: Parametric Insurance
seguro.detail: Coverage for 309 AAA coffee growers during flowering, fruit filling and harvest.

productividad.title: Productivity
items: Soil nutrition based on laboratory analysis.
EUDR compliance within the COHONDUCAFÉ Cluster by AAA producers.
Development of TASQ Assessments: Regenerative, Inclusiveness, Productivity and Quality.

calidad.title: Quality
items: Fruit classification at harvest — selection at origin

espaciosSeguros.title: Safe Spaces
espaciosSeguros.detail: 47 boys and girls served during harvest. 60% girls and 40% boys. COAEDCAL & APROCASAM cooperatives, 25–26 period.

diversificacion.title: Income Diversification
diversificacion.detail: 32 female producers with laying hens. 97% allocate production to sale, 23 producers allocate more than 50% to sale.

seguroParametrico.title: Parametric Insurance
seguroParametrico.detail: 309 AAA producers covered by Parametric Insurance, for farm coverage against climate risks throughout the coffee growing stages annually.

trazabilidad.title: Open SC Traceability
trazabilidad.detail: Transparent traceability system implemented throughout the COHONDUCAFÉ cluster's value chain.

premio.title: AAA Award
premio.detail: Awards and incentives given to producers recognized for quality and sustainability in the COHONDUCAFÉ Cluster.

water.description: Access to drinking water for producing families in the COHONDUCAFÉ cluster, improving the health and quality of life of the communities.
